mapper.insert:
insert into his_billing_refund_order_line ( id, tenant_id, refund_order_id, consume_link_id, return_qty, dep_inventory_id, gz_dep_inventory_id, in_hospital_code, batch_no, end_date_snapshot, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.refundOrderId}, #{e.consumeLinkId}, #{e.returnQty}, #{e.depInventoryId}, #{e.gzDepInventoryId}, #{e.inHospitalCode}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.endDateSnapshot}, #{e.remark}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0), #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime}, #{e.updateBy}, #{e.updateTime})
